Name: AI_SOUND_PARAM_ST
Description: Defines sounds that enemies can hear

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: How long the sound will be heard

Fields.Name: Affected by SpEffects
Fields.Description: Determines whether or not speffects can affect this sound

Fields.Name: Heard by Enemies
Fields.Description: Will your enemies hear this sound?

Fields.Name: Heard by Allies
Fields.Description: Will your allies hear this sound?

Fields.Name: Restricted to Placement Group
Fields.Description: Sound will only be heard by enemies within the same PlacementGroup

Fields.Name: Call Friend
Fields.Description: Is it a sound to call friends? Occurs only when you have an enemy target
